streams.head: 0948fed6f29bb2d2ed7058fba4ed16fac636b3c8
streams.notes: master is production/site authority; local master = origin/master = 0948fed6f29bb2d2ed7058fba4ed16fac636b3c8 (fast-forwarded after the security remediation merge, PR #1). Tracked tree is clean. The security remediation merge was NOT deployed: production behavior remains the 2026-07-18 rollback deployment (183d5559af9e608f168636a7ff998b8fdf7f5a6b, restoring the tracked behavior/tree of the a4d89d4d1df420fc1922625cdde126f2064da4a2 release). Production exchange-review pages and their vertical hero cards remain frozen; no public GEO/market page was created or published; no architecture implementation was deployed. No architecture/design branch is merged into master except the security remediation. The 172 untracked entries in this physical worktree belong to the market-intelligence stream (evidence/tooling/temp artifacts), not to production, and must not be cleaned or treated as architecture implementation.

streams.head: 1cb69ab1cf79f9f42d1eb8a68678abad76fdc981
streams.notes: Architecture V3 is designed, owner-approved and committed on its feature branch: package status ARCHITECTURE_V3_OWNER_APPROVED_COMMITTED; commit chain a3dea7e451d046d5f01515bf085962f6f92a9fa7 (initial architecture, task 004) -> 55aacac97554de11d7e8e42823857dcf56444b74 (lifecycle reconciliation, task 006) -> 1cb69ab1cf79f9f42d1eb8a68678abad76fdc981 (LOCALE10 consistency fix, task 009; verified by task 010) -> this current-state reconciliation commit (task 013-R2, which advances the branch by one documentation commit above the 1cb69ab baseline). Architecture V3 is NOT yet merged into master; MERGE_TO_MASTER_AUTHORIZED=false; implementation and production publication remain unauthorized. The market-first URL architecture, locale rules, ten page-family definitions, RegionResolver, CountryVisualProfile system, RegionAvailabilityModule and the read-only Market Intelligence boundary are preserved unchanged. Next: CBW-GLOBAL-SITE-ARCHITECTURE-V3-PR-REVIEW-014.

streams.head: ee01f3ca7c65045dbd81bccbbb3fe5e64bc94ead
uncommittedScope: _handoff/ (untracked screenshots + preview notes; never committed by convention)
streams.notes: Unified Design Foundation v1 is COMMITTED at ee01f3ca7c65045dbd81bccbbb3fe5e64bc94ead (branch feat/cbw-unified-design-v2; square-first logo system, OfferSurface family, section grammar). The Exchange Review V2 review prototype (owner-selected THREE_ZONE_FIRST_SCREEN direction) remains SEPARATE and UNCOMMITTED on feat/cbw-exchange-review-v2, awaiting owner review (CBW-EXCHANGE-REVIEW-V2-OWNER-REVIEW-002). The region-aware layout is still not committed anywhere. Production review pages and their vertical hero cards remain frozen; no production route was changed. Older design-v1 worktree C:\projects\CryptoBonusWorld-design remains at c8d004a95f0a36a62d3d29070ff4fd42a33f1a81 (feat/cbw-homepage-template-v1) with 5 untracked superseded homepage-template entries; it is not the active design worktree and no cleanup of it is authorized.

streams.head: 0948fed6f29bb2d2ed7058fba4ed16fac636b3c8

streams.notes: Active source-master untracked research/evidence files remain preserved (the same 172-path set). KZ Bybit P0-A pipeline is CLOSED (closeout committed 67bdca3, 2026-07-21: canonical package committed, MIGRATION_5 preview committed non-production, production UNCHANGED, NOT_DEPLOYED). KZ MEXC P0-B is in flight at the documentation stage: its import-prep design was committed in the commit that later became SHA 0198d9f (2026-07-22, now an ancestor of master). The next MI import task CBW-KZ-MEXC-P0-B-STAGING-IMPORT-003 has NOT started and awaits owner issuance. MI data is canonical only via read-only adapters and cannot bind directly to production pages. None of the untracked entries is a production change.

streams.head: 1cb69ab1cf79f9f42d1eb8a68678abad76fdc981
streams.notes: Architecture only — no locale-stream implementation task has ever executed (locale architecture documents were delivered by the architecture stream). No locale routes are implemented. No market-language pair is published. KZ (/kz/ru/ default, /kz/kk/, /kz/en/), PL (/pl/pl/ default, /pl/uk/, /pl/ru/, /pl/en/) and DE (/de/de/ default, /de/en/) pairs all remain PLANNED in the MarketLanguageMatrix. Publication and data binding remain unauthorized.

streams.head: 0948fed6f29bb2d2ed7058fba4ed16fac636b3c8
streams.notes: Production-credential incident CLOSED (status RESOLVED_CURRENT_TREE / ACCESS_REVOKED / NO_DEPLOY). The exposed production credential was rotated and revoked out-of-band; SSH password authentication and keyboard-interactive authentication are disabled; root access is restricted to public-key authentication with the authorized root key verified; the current deployment code no longer contains hardcoded production credentials; remediation PR #1 was merged into master (merge commit 0948fed6f29bb2d2ed7058fba4ed16fac636b3c8) with NO deployment; Hetzner account 2FA is enabled; the security worktree and security branch were removed after merge. No current P0 access exposure. Accepted backlog: the revoked credential remains in historical Git objects (a full Git-history rewrite is deferred and requires separate owner authorization); future migration from root deployment to a restricted non-root deploy user. See securityIncident. No secret value is recorded anywhere in this file.

securityIncident.summary: A hardcoded production deployment credential in tracked deployment code was removed from the current tree; the exposed credential was rotated/revoked out-of-band; no deployment occurred during remediation.
remediation: exposed production root password rotated and revoked out-of-band
root access restricted to public-key authentication
current deployment code no longer contains hardcoded production credentials
remediation PR #1 merged into master (merge commit 0948fed6f29bb2d2ed7058fba4ed16fac636b3c8)
no production deployment occurred during incident remediation
security worktree and security branch removed after merge
acceptedBacklog: the revoked credential remains in historical Git objects; a full Git-history rewrite is deferred and requires separate owner authorization
future migration from root deployment to a restricted non-root deploy user
securityIncident.secretHandling: no password, host, IP, username, key path or key fingerprint is recorded; the historical credential is described only as revoked/compromised and is never printed or reconstructed

Proceed with the KZ MEXC P0-B staging import, and how should the 172 untracked MI/evidence/QA entries in the master worktree be dispositioned (commit governed scopes vs. bulk cleanup per the 2026-07-18 audit recommendation)?

Authorize the first implementation wave (W1 Exchange Review V2 rollout), which requires PAGE_IMPLEMENTATION_AUTHORIZED and depends on the Exchange Review V2 prototype disposition and the architecture V3 merge?

lastDeploy.scope: Rollback commit 183d5559af9e608f168636a7ff998b8fdf7f5a6b deployed to production, restoring the tracked site behavior/tree of the a4d89d4d1df420fc1922625cdde126f2064da4a2 release (outbound registration new-tab hotfix). This remains the most recent production deployment: the later security remediation merge (master 0948fed6f29bb2d2ed7058fba4ed16fac636b3c8) was NOT deployed, and no architecture, design or MI work has been deployed. Evidence chain: the 2026-07-18 full-site audit (artifacts 15:21-15:26) live-verified the a4d89d4 deployment; the unified-hero commit b4abec9 (16:48) was reverted by 183d555 (17:01); dist/ was then rebuilt at 17:03 from the post-revert tree (light hp-intro homepage present, unified-hero assets absent) via the standard clean-build-and-upload deploy pipeline, and the design-authority docs treat the reverted state as the live baseline (the unified-hero redesign must not be restored).
